regulatory_framework: Financial Sector Conduct Authority Act 9 of 2017

data_sources.ECS: Equities Clearing System - settlement positions and exposures
data_sources.CIS: Counterparty Information System - credit and operational profiles
data_sources.TIS: Trade Information System - transaction details and settlement windows

human_escalations.regulatory_justification: JSE Rulebook Section 22 requires human oversight for CRITICAL classifications during systemic risk conditions and regulatory investigations

settlement_rolls.regulatory_justification: Automated intervention authorized under FSCA Guidelines for securities shortfall mitigation

TRD-2001.justification: Net obligation ZAR 120M exceeds regulatory threshold during market volatility
TRD-2001.regulatory_basis: Large exposure monitoring per FSCA prudential requirements

TRD-2007.justification: CIS system unavailability creates monitoring blind spot for ZAR 55M exposure
TRD-2007.regulatory_basis: Operational risk management per FSCA oversight requirements

TRD-2005.justification: Active FSCA investigation creates elevated compliance risk requiring enhanced monitoring
TRD-2005.regulatory_basis: Regulatory flag compliance per FSCA enforcement procedures

gaps_identified.impact: Unable to verify lending positions and credit metrics for ZAR 55M exposure
gaps_identified.remediation_required: CIS connectivity restoration before next monitoring cycle

compliance_officer_attestation: This report confirms SFPP system compliance with FSCA settlement failure prevention requirements. All CRITICAL exposures properly escalated per regulatory framework. Data quality gap for CP-007 flagged for remediation.
